pi_items.source: export_result.sh ORK_FILE variable and verifier.py logic.
setup_task.sh which launches OpenRocket with this specific source file.
verifier.py uses this value to determine task success (passed = score >= pass_threshold).

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a real, standard example rocket design ('A simple model rocket' by Sampo Niskanen) provided with OpenRocket. The initial rocket file is confirmed to be simple_model_rocket.ork. The task explicitly requires the modified design to be saved to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/spliced_airframe.ork and the summary report to /home/ga/Documents/exports/splice_repair_report.txt, which match the export and verifier scripts. The passing score threshold is verified to be 70 out of 100 points.
